reviews.author: Shruti Varshney
reviews.review_body: Very happy with the school system and with the cooperative attitude of the teachers for making the student more confident

reviews.author: Laxmi Bisht
reviews.review_body: YPS is one of the best school having fully air conditioned class rooms, large play ground and good infrastructure in Noida. All staff including management teams are well educated, disciplined and cooperative. Teaching techniques are different rather than other school.

reviews.author: Kajal Ghai
reviews.review_body: This is one of the best school here. Good and amazing workplace. The principal of the school is very nice.  She is very co-operative with everyone. Education system is excellent and staff teachers all are so humble and sweet spoken. It focuses on the holistic development of the child. It is fully air-conditioned school. The playground of the school is very big. This school has a good balance between studies and curriculum as well as sports and extracurricular activities.  There is also a special arrangement for karate classes. Highly recommended!!

reviews.author: Jaya Dabral
reviews.review_body: Yadu public school, located in Noida, is a well-regarded institution that is known for its commitment to providing a high-quality education to its students.The school has a dedicated and experienced faculty, and offers a wide range of academic programs that are designed to challenge and inspire students.The school's facilities are modern and well-maintained, providing an ideal learning environment for students.

reviews.author: Sangeeta Yadav
reviews.review_body: Kids can learn a lot in this institution. For more than 20 years, it has improved lives and provided education. The school has a distinctive method of instruction that emphasises fun and practical learning, which makes it simpler for pupils to understand. Sports and extracurricular activities are equally valued at schools in addition to academics. Its infrastructure and laboratories meet international standards. The school adopts contemporary teaching techniques and adapts them as necessary. Overall, YPS is an excellent place for kids to learn because it provides all the necessary resources, including teachers, infrastructure, methodologies, and approaches. To all students and parents, I'd suggest YPS.
